title: event.v1
description: An external event published to the agent control plane — the event-source → agent-api ingress seam. Email (email.received), the post-meeting reconnect (meeting.completed), a task transition, news, etc. all ride this ONE envelope; the ingress maps it to a unit.v1 Invocation (trigger=event, or transcription for meeting.completed) and the SAME Dispatcher fans it out. Carries WHO it concerns (subject = the person), an OPAQUE source ref a tool resolves (never the bytes — keeps email/calendar as tools+event-sources, not platform domains), and optionally the plan the fired unit should run. No domain bytes cross here.

SourceRef.description: An opaque reference to the event's source object (an email, a doc) that a cred-gated tool resolves — never the bytes.

MeetingRef.description: Which meeting a meeting.completed event refers to — ids only (the meetings⊥agent boundary).

Plan.description: Optional plan the fired unit runs — an inline prompt and/or a workspace plan-doc ref. If absent, the ingress applies the default plan registered for the event name (e.g. the Inbox-triage plan for email.received).

Event.description: One external event. name discriminates the kind; subject is the person; source/meeting carry the opaque context ref.

subject.description: identity.v1 subject = the person whose workspace + units this concerns
